answers: Morning routine: wake at consistent time, hydrate, move your body, healthy breakfast, plan your day. No phone for 30 min.
Tips: prepare the night before, wake 30 min earlier than needed, expose yourself to sunlight, and start with something you enjoy.
Productive morning: exercise, meditation, journaling, learning, or deep work. Avoid email and social media first thing.
Shokal er rutin: fixed time e utho, pani khao, exercise koro, healthy breakfast khao, ar din er plan koro.
